title: Holaboss Apps Marketplace Manifest
description: Single source of truth for the holaboss admin app registry. Synced into the marketplace via POST /api/v1/marketplace/admin/apps/sync. See docs/MARKETPLACE_SYNC_DESIGN.md.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped only when the manifest contract itself changes.

default_ref.description: Git ref (tag or branch) used when no per-app override is set. Updated each release.

archive_url_template.description: URL template with {ref}, {name}, {target} placeholders. Sandbox runtime substitutes target at install time.

name.description: Unique app slug — primary key in app_registry. Matches the directory name in this repo and the MCP tool prefix.

readme.description: Optional Markdown shown on the marketplace detail page. If absent, the sync endpoint may pull <path>/README.md from the repo.

icon.description: Icon identifier — frontend resolves to an SVG/image. Conventionally a lowercase brand slug.

category.description: Top-level group: social | productivity | crm | … Frontend filters by this.

path.description: Subdirectory inside repo where the module lives.

default_ref.description: Per-app override of the manifest-level default_ref. Use to pin a single app to a different tag.

archive_url_template.description: Per-app override of the manifest-level archive_url_template. Rare — only for apps hosted off the main release artifact stream.

provider_id.description: Composio toolkit slug used by this app's bridge calls. May differ from `name` (e.g. sheets → googlesheets).
